samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Multiplies two 8-bit operands using a shift-and-add approach.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">First 8-bit input operand (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Second 8-bit input operand (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the product of A and B.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Initialize variables
        integer i;
        reg [15:0] product_reg = 16'd0; // Register to hold the product value
        reg [7:0] multiplicand = 8'd0;   // Register to hold the current multiplicand
        reg [7:0] multiplier = 8'd0;     // Register to hold the current multiplier
        
        // Assign input values to local variables
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            multiplicand <= A;
            multiplier <= B;
        end
        
        // Perform multiplication operation
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if (i == 0) begin
                product_reg <= 16'd0; // Reset product register
            end else if (multiplier[i-1]) begin
                product_reg <= product_reg + (multiplicand << (i-1)); // Add multiplicand shifted left by i-1 positions
            end
        end
        
        // Shift multiplicand left by 1 position after each iteration
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            multiplicand <= multiplicand << 1;
        end
        
        // Iterate through each bit of the multiplier
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if (i < 8) begin
                i <= i + 1; // Increment counter
            end else begin
                i <= 0; // Reset counter
            end
        end
        
        // Output the final product value
        assign product = product_reg;
        
    </implementation>
    
</module>
